reasoning: Your primary limiter is lactate clearance and fatigue resistance. Given your extended rest at a low intensity during the last ride, we need to reintroduce intensity gradually while addressing this limiter. Training specifically on Emigration Canyon will simulate conditions you'll face on the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5x 6-min over-unders (3 min at 209-218W, 2 min at 242-256W, 1 min recovery spin)

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
